sch_subtitle: Explore current initiatives by the Government of India and apply directly.
sch_elig_kisan: Who should apply: Landholding farmer families.
sch_info_kisan: Provides income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments to all landholding farmer families.
sch_elig_ayushman: Who should apply: Economically weaker sections (EWS) and vulnerable families.
sch_info_ayushman: Provides a health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
sch_elig_pmay: Who should apply: Homeless citizens, people living in kutcha houses, LIG, EWS.
sch_info_pmay: Provides financial assistance to build permanent (pucca) houses with basic amenities like water and electricity.
sch_elig_ssy: Who should apply: Parents or legal guardians of a girl child below 10 years of age.
sch_info_ssy: A high-interest small deposit scheme to secure the future education and marriage expenses of a girl child.
sch_elig_standup: Who should apply: Women entrepreneurs, SC/ST category entrepreneurs.
sch_info_standup: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh and ₹1 Crore to set up a new enterprise in manufacturing, services, or trading.
